title: Cereal Entomology: Achievements and projections for the future
abstract:
Research in Cereal Entomology was initiatl at ICRISAT in 1973 under the leadership of Dr. J.C. Davies. In 1973, Dr .K.V. Seshu Reddy joined as Research Associate and he left the sub-program in 1980. In 1979, D r . H.C. Sharma was employed followed by Dr. S.L. Taneja in 1981.
After Dr. Davies became Director of Cooperative Programs, Dr. Klaus Leuschner was appointed Principal Entomologist in 1981
